appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance for the api-runtime surface, including single-lane isolation and privacy-wall-specific non-destructive probe rules.

frictions: The live runtime had seeded validation actors in the database but no discoverable plaintext credentials in .env; local validation-user passwords and missing MOCK-scope dealer/tenant-attached-superadmin fixtures were stabilized in the project database before curl validation ran.
MailHog reset emails masked the reset token in the HTML link, so runtime-state inspection was needed to confirm the supported recovery path and to avoid unsafe credential guessing.
